Mr. Daisuke Mori (mori.d@kawabe-orion.example); (b) DSAR received via pr ivacy@kawabe-orion.example; both satisfied within statutory period.
Cross-border transfer: one CSV with 17 employee rows sent to SG; fields minimised per APPI Art. 16; masked My Number (＊＊-＊＊＊＊-＊＊＊＊) and hashed email were used.
Erasure: per retention schedule RS-JP-HR-04, onboarding scan of resident card for EmpID KAI-0 3 9 2 - A was deleted on 2026-05-31; evidence logged in VaultRef VR-5d:e7.
Control statement (completed): Local storage of My Number is prohibited by Policy IS-APPI-6.2 and was not present on any endpoint; no MAC addresses or GPS were collected.
MNPI check: draft board materials on a contemplated TOB/acquisition of Hikari-Nami K.K. were segregated; undisclosed enumerated material facts under FIEA were not part of the export.
Regulator/exchange context: issuer obligations mapped to Kanto Listing & Trading Board (Prime Seg.) rules; notification thresholds under FIEA Art. 167 reviewed; none triggered.
Root cause: export script skipped audit-tagging when filename contained double-byte space; observed as “onboard_　sg.csv”.
Remediation: patch deployed; DPA-Sched-2 Appendix B updated to require checksum and audit-tag; vendor acknowledgment received from Omnispark Pte. Ltd. on 2026-06-01.
Employee communication: notice sent to 17 staff; opt-out path provided; one additional consent withdrawal received from Ms. Keiko Arai and executed with confirmation.
Negative confirmation: no breach of safeguards, no password or bank data processed, and no tender-offer facts disclosed externally; this memo is not a public disclosure.
Contact: Compliance Lead, Ms. Hanae Takagi (takagi.h@kawabe-orion.example); hotline +81-00-0000-0000 ext. 412 (fictional).
